title: Living in Boulder vlog 7 - 8 - 2017: Setting up Green Screen Bike Section

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about technical difficulties with his computer and phone, then updates on his indoor cycling setup: riding 40 miles inside, losing 4 pounds, buying clipless pedals and cycling shoes on discount, and planning to set up a green screen behind his bike area. He also mentions watching a show about Rome, working on a website related to his bike roller data, and reflects on his financial situation.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: enjoys it and finds it effective for fitness, lost 4 lbs in one session
frustrated that the roller speed chart isn't accurate for him; wants to build his own website to track his specific data
wanted them but found them expensive; satisfied after getting a discount
has a strong desire to green screen his bike riding area to overlay different backgrounds
acknowledges financial stress but feels finishing his website project will help him ask for money/income

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My computer has been making noise all day long and won't shut up.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I tried recording with my cell phone to avoid the noise, but the phone is corrupted.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I spent two hours with tech support trying to fix my phone.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I plan to resolve the phone issue tomorrow so I can record without hearing the noise.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I rode my bike indoors for 40 miles and lost four pounds.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I went to the doctor and had my blood pressure taken, which was 200 over something.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I realized I need to know my walking or driving speed to adjust my bike rollers correctly.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I looked at a chart to pace myself but found it inaccurate for my needs.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I need to lean a certain way to make the bike rollers work better for me.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I bought new pedals for my bike after getting a discount.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I also bought new shoes because my old ones weren't compatible with the new pedals.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I spent $180 on shoes, originally priced at $250.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm trying not to think about money right now.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I wanted to set up a green screen for my bike area but had to move pictures around first.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I plan to finish setting up the green screen tomorrow.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I've been listening to videos about archaeology and Amazonian buildings.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I watched a show about drama and enjoyed it, finishing season two today.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I worked on my website while riding my bike and watching TV.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm focusing on finishing my website to improve my financial situation.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I work slower when I'm not busy, which makes it harder to focus.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I haven't done a video in many days, which is why I'm talking so much now.
